---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Dubdeck
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case? Describe the pain
point rather than jumping straight to a solution.

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Anything else: provider type, deployment shape, screenshots, links to related
issues. If this is about a provider not yet supported, say which one.
